title: Shusugaunt

'''Shusugaunt''' was a high-[[Gravity/Legends|gravity]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]] located in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories']] [[Raioballo sector/Legends|Raioballo sector]]. It was the [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] of the warlike [[Shusugaunt (species)|Shusugaunt]] [[Species/Legends|species]]. [[Millennium/Legends|Millennia]] before the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], the [[Realspace/Legends|spacefaring]] Shusugaunt encountered the [[Sentience/Legends|sentient]] [[Anx/Legends|Anx]] of the nearby planet [[Gravlex Med/Legends|Gravlex Med]]. The former [[Conquest of Anx Space|conquered]] and [[Slavery/Legends|enslaved]] the latter, relocating many Anx to Shusugaunt. The Anx could not survive the planet's high gravity, however, and eventually [[Death/Legends|perished]].

[[Standard century/Legends|Centuries]] later, [[Archaeologist/Legends|archaeologists]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] discovered the [[Bone/Legends|bones]] of the previously-unknown Anx on Shusugaunt, initially believing them to be the remains of a native species of [[Water/Legends|aquatic]] creature. Eventually, Shusugaunt became a part of the Republic's Raioballo [[Sector/Legends|sector]] and had sanctions placed against its native Shusugaunt by the [[Galactic Senate/Legends|Galactic Senate]]. The Anx [[Senator/Legends|Senator]] [[Horox Ryyder/Legends|Horox Ryyder]] of the sector subsequently attempted to have the sanctions eased. Between [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]] and [[12 ABY/Legends|12 ABY]], Shusugaunt was situated in the territory of the [[Pentastar Alignment]].

==Description==
Shusugaunt was a terrestrial [[Planet/Legends|planet]]<ref name="Gamer7" /> located in the [[Shusugaunt system/Legends|Shusugaunt system]], a part of the [[Raioballo sector/Legends|Raioballo sector]] in the [[New Territories/Legends|New Territories]] portion of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]].<ref name="TEA" /> It was a high-[[Gravity/Legends|gravity]] world with [[Ocean/Legends|seas]] on its surface, and it lay dozens of [[Light-year/Legends|light years]] away from the planet [[Gravlex Med/Legends|Gravlex Med]].<ref name="Gamer7" />

==History==
===Encountering the Anx===
[[Millennium/Legends|Millennia]] before the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], Shusugaunt's [[Shusugaunt (species)|eponymous sentient species]] encountered the [[Anx/Legends|Anx]], a [[Species/Legends|species]] from the low-gravity planet Gravlex Med that had recently [[Colonist/Legends|colonized]] nearby [[Star system/Legends|star systems]] of the region known as [[Anx Space]]. The Shusugaunt launched a [[Conquest of Anx Space|conquest]] of the region, driving the Anx back to their [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] and [[Slavery/Legends|enslaving]] them. Many Anx vassals were [[Transport/Legends|transported]] to Shusugaunt, but they could not survive the high gravity of the planet and [[Death/Legends|perished]] there.<ref name="Gamer7" />

[[File:Anx-NEGAS.png|thumb|right|200px|The Galactic Republic first became aware of the Anx species through the discovery of ancient skeletons on Shusugaunt.]]
In addition, the Shusugaunt conquest of the Anx was short-lived due to the inability of the former to adapt to the low-gravity conditions of Gravlex Med. The Shusugaunt soon launched a new series of internecine wars and lost interest in the Anx. The next species-wide [[Shusugaunt Republic space jihad|jihad]] the Shusugaunt launched took them into the territory of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] and proved disastrous to the would-be conquerors in the face of the superior Republic military might.<ref name="Gamer7" />

===Under the Republic===
Republic [[Archaeologist/Legends|archaeologists]] visited Shusugaunt [[Standard century/Legends|centuries]] after the Anx relocated to the planet had gone extinct. There, the researchers discovered numerous [[Bone/Legends|skeletons]] of the species, which the Republic had not encountered before. The remains were thought by [[Xenobiologist/Legends|xenobiologists]] to belong to a native species of powerful [[Water/Legends|aquatic]] creatures that had been [[Hunting/Legends|hunted]] to extinction by the Shusugaunt shortly prior.<ref name="Gamer7" /> At some point by [[3643 BBY]],<ref name="3643 BBY">''[[The Old Republic: Fatal Alliance]]'', the events of which ''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'' dates to approximately [[3643 BBY]], features an [[Anx/Legends|Anx]] [[Republic Navy/Legends|Republic Navy]] [[Republic officer/Legends|officer]], [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Pipalidi]], therefore the [[Species/Legends|species]] must have been discovered by the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]], as described in {{GamerCite|7|The University of Sanbra Guide to Intelligent Life: The Anx}}, at some point by that date.</ref> further [[Scout/Legends|exploration]] of the region led to the Republic discovering the Anx on Gravlex Med, disproving the earlier theory on the origins of the bones found on Shusugaunt.<ref name="Gamer7" />

Shusugaunt became incorporated into the Republic's Raioballo [[Sector/Legends|sector]] over the subsequent thousands of [[Standard year/Legends|years]], being situated on that territory's edge. It was among the thousands of the sector's worlds that were represented in the [[Galactic Senate/Legends|Republic Senate]] by the Anx [[Senator/Legends|senator]] [[Horox Ryyder/Legends|Horox Ryyder]]<ref name="Gamer7" /> until [[Gender/Legends|his]] retirement<ref name="HNN">{{HoloNetNewsWeb|48|news/13321_3.html|Senator Horox Ryyder Retires}}</ref> in [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]].<ref name="Date">{{HoloNetNewsWeb|48|news/13321_3.html|Senator Horox Ryyder Retires}}, which mentions [[Horox Ryyder/Legends|Horox Ryyder's]] retirement, is set on the [[Great ReSynchronization|date]] "13:3:21," which corresponds to [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]], per the reasoning [[Template:YearMathGRS|here]].</ref> Ryyder was level-headed and impartial in representing his constituents and even pressed the Senate to ease the sanctions levied against the Shusugaunt. Over [[Time/Legends|time]], the proximity of the planet to Gravlex Med gave rise to one of [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy's]] strangest rivalries due to the contrasting natures of the warlike Shusugaunt and the placid Anx.<ref name="Gamer7" /> Between [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]] and [[12 ABY/Legends|12 ABY]], Shusugaunt lay within the territory of the [[Pentastar Alignment]].<ref name="TEA" />

==Inhabitants==
Shusugaunt was the homeworld of the Shusugaunt, a species of short, hyperactively warlike [[Sentience/Legends|sentients]] that spoke the [[Shusugaunt (language)/Legends|Shusugaunt]] [[Language/Legends|language]]. The Shusugaunt had a [[Realspace/Legends|spacefaring]] society that was prone to internecine religious conflicts. Occasionally, the Shusugaunt became united against perceived off-world enemies, and on such occasions, their leaders, known as hierarchs, sent Shusugaunt braves on species-wide jihads against their foes.<ref name="Gamer7" />

==Behind the scenes==
Shusugaunt was first mentioned in "[[The University of Sanbra Guide to Intelligent Life: The Anx]]," an article authored by [[Craig Robert Carey|Craig R. Carey]], [[Jason Fry]], and [[Daniel Wallace]] and published in [[Star Wars Gamer 7|''Star Wars Gamer'' 7]]<ref name="Gamer7" /> on [[October 16]], [[2001]].<ref name="SW.com">{{SWArchive|url=gaming/other/rpg/news20011018.html|text=Live on the Fringe: ''Gamer'' # 7}}</ref> The [[2009]] reference book ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' placed the Shusugaunt system, and therefore Shusugaunt itself, in grid square L-4.<ref name="TEA" />
